title: Coccineorchis standleyi

It belongs to the genus Coccineorchis, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. This orchid is native to Central America, particularly in Costa Rica and Panama. The classification of Coccineorchis standleyi is further categorized under the tribe Cranichideae. This unique orchid is known for its distinctive characteristics and is of interest to orchid enthusiasts and botanists.
